title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a marketplace for AI coding workflows within Archon, enabling users to share and reuse battle-tested agentic engineering workflows. The platform supports YAML-defined workflows that run in isolated git worktrees with any model provider.
